nasb.text: Then she gave birth to a son, and he named him Gershom, for he said, “I have been a sojourner in a foreign land.”

esv.text: She gave birth to a son, and he called his name Gershom, for he said, “I have been a sojourner in a foreign land.”

cnv.text: 西坡拉生了一個兒子，摩西給他起名叫革舜，因為他說：“我在異地作了客旅。”

ccb.text: 后来，西坡拉生了一个儿子，摩西给他取名叫革舜，意思是“我成了在异乡寄居的人”。
